SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2019 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING PROVIDED DOCUMENTATION THAT THEY FULLY REFUNDED RESPONDENT KARIM LAACHFOUBI. NO FURTHER PAYMENT IS REQUIRED OF APPELLANT AS THE ORIGINAL SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED IN FULL. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF OCT-10-2019. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT SF SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING DBA SAN FRANCISCO FILM SCHOOL TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT LAACHFOUBI, KARIM APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO SCHOOL OF DIGITAL FILMMAKING PROVIDED DOCUMENTATION THAT THEY FULLY REFUNDED RESPONDENT KARIM LAACHFOUBI. NO FURTHER PAYMENT IS REQUIRED OF APPELLANT AS THE ORIGINAL SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT HAS BEEN SATISFIED IN FULL. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeremiah Birnbaum for the Defendant/Appellant San Francisco School of Digital Filmmaking. No appearance by any other party or interested person.

The Court notes the absence of the respondent but that service of the notice of appeal appears to have been

Mr. Birnbaum presents evidence of a cashed check, the original return receipt of certified mail, and a letter from the California State Bureau of Private Post-Secondary Educationnoting the investigation of the Plaintiff/Respondent's claim and that the matter had been concluded to the satisfaction of the Plaintiff/Respondent.

The Court questions Mr. Birnbaum as to the address of the Plaintiff/Respondent and efforts made to verify the same.

In light of the evidence presented and the Court, satisfied as to the verification of the Plaintiff/Respondent's address, grants the appeal in favor of the Defendant/Appellant, noting that in essence, the evidence presented is satisfaction of the original judgment.

Judge: Hon. Kathleen A. Kelly; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D220)
